patient_summary: 73-year-old patient (DOB 05/05/1952) with documented mixed dyslipidemia and essential hypertension. Additional diagnoses include postoperative/unspecified anemia and leg pain; Piedmont records list hyperlipidemia associated with type 2 diabetes mellitus. Major recent procedure: COLONOSCOPY WITH BIOPSY scheduled/performed 02/21/2025 with Mustafa Haroon, MD. Notable laboratory abnormalities: 07/03/2023 ferritin 266.8 (H) ng/mL; iron 41 (L) ug/dL with iron saturation 15% (L); eGFR CKD-EPI 58 (L) ml/min/1.73m2; triglycerides 158 (H) mg/dL. Prior labs include glucose 199 (H) on 01/11/2021. Active care team includes Hoyet A. Hand, MD (PCP), Shankar Kandaswamy, MD (pulmonary), and multiple specialty providers at Piedmont. Conflicting demographic and social-history entries (legal sex, DOB formatting, tobacco use) are documented in source records.
